name: Marinated Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Can of Yellow Beans, drained
14 oz Can of Green Beans, drained
19 oz Can of Kidney Beans, drained
14 oz Can of Lima Beans, drained
19 oz Can of Chick Peas, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the marinade ingredients in a bowl and shake well.
2. Add the drained beans and finely chopped vegetables to the marinade.
3. Let stand in the fridge for a day or two before using.
